QUANTUM COMPUTING
# The Impossibilities Are Endless™
Build your quantum strategy today. Access 40+ quantum technologies, develop internal expertise, and solve problems that will benefit from quantum computing.
[Talk to an Expert](https://strangeworks.com/contact)
[Explore Backstage Pass](https://strangeworks.com/backstage)
THE OPPORTUNITY
## Why Quantum Computing?
Quantum computing represents a fundamental shift in computational capability. While classical computers process information in bits (0 or 1), quantum computers use qubits that can exist in multiple states simultaneously, enabling them to solve certain problems exponentially faster.
For enterprises, this means the potential to tackle optimization, simulation, and machine learning challenges that are currently intractable.
Strangeworks is one of the original quantum computing software companies, founded in 2018. We've spent years building relationships with hardware vendors, developing real applications, and helping enterprises separate hype from reality.
### Key Quantum Applications
### Optimization
Solve complex combinatorial problems in logistics, finance, and manufacturing
### Simulation
Model molecular interactions for drug design and materials discovery
### Machine Learning
Accelerate training and inference for specific ML workloads
YOUR QUANTUM JOURNEY
## Build a Quantum Strategy
Strangeworks helps organizations build and execute a quantum strategy by addressing the questions that matter most to your business.
### Identify Opportunities
Which quantum applications are relevant to your business? When will quantum impact your industry?
### Create a Roadmap
What are your short-, mid-, and long-term goals? How should progress be tracked?
### Build Capability
When should education and proofs of concept begin? What partners best align with your goals?
THE GUIDED JOURNEY
## From learning to deployment
We guide organizations through each phase of quantum adoption, from initial education to production deployment.
01
### Learn
Understand quantum applications and timing
02
### Identify
Find high-value problems for quantum
03
### Strategize
Create your quantum roadmap
04
### Prove
Conduct proofs of concept
05
### Deploy
Put applications into production
USE CASES
## Quantum Applications by Industry
Quantum computing has potential applications across industries. Here are some areas where organizations are exploring quantum approaches.
### Finance
Portfolio optimization, risk management, fraud detection
### Healthcare & Life Sciences
Drug design, molecular simulation, protein folding
### Energy
Grid optimization, resource scheduling, network design
### Logistics & Manufacturing
Supply chain, production planning, quality control
### Defense & Aerospace
Mission planning, materials design, simulation
### Automotive
Vehicle routing, manufacturing, battery research
[View All Use Cases](https://strangeworks.com/use-cases)
[Explore Optimization](https://strangeworks.com/optimization)
THE PLATFORM
## Access the Quantum Ecosystem
Strangeworks provides unified access to one of the largest collections of quantum hardware and software providers, enabling you to explore, compare, and deploy across 40+ technologies.
01
### Gate-Based Quantum
Access leading gate-model quantum processors
02
### Quantum Annealers
Hardware optimized for combinatorial optimization
03
### Quantum-Inspired
Classical algorithms inspired by quantum principles
04
### Simulators
High-performance quantum simulation
### Strangeworks Compute
The largest catalog of quantum, quantum-inspired, HPC, and classical solvers. One-click access to most providers.
[Learn more](https://strangeworks.com/technology/compute)
### Backstage Pass
Free early access to quantum hardware, software, and new features. Shape the future of quantum computing.
[Apply now](https://strangeworks.com/backstage)
GET STARTED
## How We Work Together
Whether you need strategic guidance, hands-on development, or access to our platform, we have engagement models that fit your needs.
01
OPTION ONE
### Launchpad
Fixed-scope, fixed-budget engagement. Get a working prototype or roadmap in weeks, not months. Perfect for proving out quantum approaches.
02
OPTION TWO
### Forward Deployed Experts
Our experts embed directly in your team, solving problems alongside you and transferring knowledge as we go. Build lasting quantum capability.
03
OPTION THREE
### Ecosystem Partners
Access our network of quantum hardware vendors, software developers, and cloud providers through Syndicate.
[Start a Project](https://strangeworks.com/launchpad)
[Learn about Experts](https://strangeworks.com/experts)

html:
QUANTUM COMPUTING

The Impossibilities Are Endless™

Build your quantum strategy today. Access 40+ quantum technologies, develop internal expertise, and solve problems that will benefit from quantum computing.

Talk to an Expert
Explore Backstage Pass

THE OPPORTUNITY

Why Quantum Computing?

Quantum computing represents a fundamental shift in computational capability. While classical computers process information in bits (0 or 1), quantum computers use qubits that can exist in multiple states simultaneously, enabling them to solve certain problems exponentially faster.

For enterprises, this means the potential to tackle optimization, simulation, and machine learning challenges that are currently intractable.

Strangeworks is one of the original quantum computing software companies, founded in 2018. We've spent years building relationships with hardware vendors, developing real applications, and helping enterprises separate hype from reality.

Key Quantum Applications

Optimization

Solve complex combinatorial problems in logistics, finance, and manufacturing

Simulation

Model molecular interactions for drug design and materials discovery

Machine Learning

Accelerate training and inference for specific ML workloads

YOUR QUANTUM JOURNEY

Build a Quantum Strategy

Strangeworks helps organizations build and execute a quantum strategy by addressing the questions that matter most to your business.

Identify Opportunities

Which quantum applications are relevant to your business? When will quantum impact your industry?

Create a Roadmap

What are your short-, mid-, and long-term goals? How should progress be tracked?

Build Capability

When should education and proofs of concept begin? What partners best align with your goals?

THE GUIDED JOURNEY

From learning to deployment

We guide organizations through each phase of quantum adoption, from initial education to production deployment.

01

Learn

02

USE CASES

Quantum Applications by Industry

Quantum computing has potential applications across industries. Here are some areas where organizations are exploring quantum approaches.

Finance

Portfolio optimization, risk management, fraud detection

Healthcare & Life Sciences

Drug design, molecular simulation, protein folding

Energy

Grid optimization, resource scheduling, network design

Logistics & Manufacturing

Supply chain, production planning, quality control

Defense & Aerospace

Mission planning, materials design, simulation

Automotive

Vehicle routing, manufacturing, battery research

GET STARTED

How We Work Together

Whether you need strategic guidance, hands-on development, or access to our platform, we have engagement models that fit your needs.

01
OPTION ONE

Launchpad

Fixed-scope, fixed-budget engagement. Get a working prototype or roadmap in weeks, not months. Perfect for proving out quantum approaches.

Forward Deployed Experts

Our experts embed directly in your team, solving problems alongside you and transferring knowledge as we go. Build lasting quantum capability.
